C G S 
All Classes All Packages

C

Car - Class in <Unnamed>
a class about a car
Car(String, String, int, double) - Constructor for class Car
construct car by putting in its maker, model, year, and price

G

getMake() - Method in class Car
gets the maker of the car
getModel() - Method in class Car
gets the model of the car
getPrice() - Method in class Car
gets the price of the car
getYear() - Method in class Car
gets the year of the car

S

setMake(String) - Method in class Car
sets a new value for the maker of the car
setModel(String) - Method in class Car
sets a new value for the model of the car
setPrice(double) - Method in class Car
sets a new value for the price of the car
setYear(int) - Method in class Car
sets a new value for the year of the car
